item.title: TOMY Recalls Boon NURSH 8 oz Reusable Baby Bottles Due to Choking Hazard; Sold at Walmart
item.company: Exclusively at Walmart stores and online at Walmart.com from November 2025 through May 2026 for about $20.
item.brand: Exclusively at Walmart stores and online at Walmart.com from November 2025 through May 2026 for about $20.
item.product: Boon NURSH 8 oz Reusable Baby Bottles
item.summary: This recall involves Boon NURSH 8 oz Reusable Baby Bottles 3-Pack in pink tie dye. The recalled bottles were sold in a package containing three bottles. The bottles have a hard outer plastic shell that encases a soft silicone pouch. The Boon logo is on the side of the bottle's hard plastic shell. Item number B11654 and the UPC 669028116546 are printed on the bottom of the packaging.
item.affectedPeople: Consumers who purchased: Boon NURSH 8 oz Reusable Baby Bottles.
item.remedy: Consumers should stop using the recalled baby bottles immediately and contact TOMY to receive a refund in the form of a $22 booninc.com store credit or a replacement set of three bottles in a different color.
item.payoutAmount: Repair, refund, replacement, or other remedy if stated by the CPSC notice
